title: astragalus excedens
intro: Astragalus excedens, also known as milkvetch or huang qi, is a type of plant in the legume family native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Astragalus excedens include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce stress and fatigue, and enhance the body's natural immune response. Astragalus excedens can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent illness.
